# BirdieStats

> The most comprehensive collection of golf major championship history, player statistics, course records, and PGA Tour data on the web.

BirdieStats.com covers more than 160 years of professional golf history, including every major champion since 1860, career profiles for hundreds of players, historic course records, head-to-head rivalries, and a day-by-day calendar of golf's defining moments.

## Key Facts

- Complete history of all four major championships: the Masters (since 1934), the U.S. Open (since 1895), The Open Championship (since 1860), and the PGA Championship (since 1916)
- 238 player profiles with career statistics and major wins
- 30 historic course profiles with championship records
- 14 head-to-head player rivalry comparisons
- 366 "This Day in Golf" daily history pages (one per calendar day)
- All-time records and leaderboards across wins, majors, scoring, earnings, and cuts made
- Data compiled from official historical records and publicly available data

## Sections

- [Majors](https://birdiestats.com/majors/index.html): Complete history of golf's four major championships, with every winner, runner-up, score, and venue
  - [Masters Tournament](https://birdiestats.com/majors/masters/index.html): Masters history since 1934
  - [U.S. Open](https://birdiestats.com/majors/us-open/index.html): U.S. Open history since 1895
  - [The Open Championship](https://birdiestats.com/majors/the-open/index.html): Open Championship history since 1860
  - [PGA Championship](https://birdiestats.com/majors/pga-championship/index.html): PGA Championship history since 1916
- [Players](https://birdiestats.com/players/index.html): Career profiles for every profiled golfer, including major wins, results, and records
- [Courses](https://birdiestats.com/courses/index.html): Profiles of historic championship venues, including records and tournaments hosted
- [Head-to-Head](https://birdiestats.com/head-to-head/index.html): Side-by-side comparisons of legendary golf rivalries
- [Records & Leaderboards](https://birdiestats.com/records/index.html): All-time golf records and leaderboards
  - [Most Career Wins](https://birdiestats.com/records/most-wins/index.html): Most career PGA Tour wins, all-time
  - [Most Majors](https://birdiestats.com/records/most-majors/index.html): Most major championship wins, all-time
  - [Scoring Records](https://birdiestats.com/records/scoring-records/index.html): Lowest totals and largest margins of victory
  - [Lowest Rounds](https://birdiestats.com/records/lowest-rounds/index.html): Lowest rounds in major championship history
  - [Consecutive Cuts](https://birdiestats.com/records/consecutive-cuts/index.html): Most consecutive cuts made, all-time record
  - [Career Earnings](https://birdiestats.com/records/career-earnings/index.html): Career earnings milestones and the all-time money list
  - [Notable Records](https://birdiestats.com/records/notable-records/index.html): Other notable all-time golf records
- [This Day in Golf](https://birdiestats.com/this-day-in-golf/index.html): Day-by-day calendar of historic golf moments, with one page for each day of the year
- [PGA Tour](https://birdiestats.com/pga-tour/index.html): PGA Tour data and statistics
- [About](https://birdiestats.com/about/index.html): About BirdieStats and its data sources
- [Sitemap](https://birdiestats.com/sitemap.xml): Full XML sitemap of all pages

## URL Patterns

- Player profile: `https://birdiestats.com/players/{player-slug}/index.html` (e.g. `/players/tiger-woods/index.html`)
- Course profile: `https://birdiestats.com/courses/{course-slug}/index.html` (e.g. `/courses/augusta-national-golf-club/index.html`)
- Head-to-head matchup: `https://birdiestats.com/head-to-head/{player-a}-vs-{player-b}/index.html` (e.g. `/head-to-head/tiger-woods-vs-phil-mickelson/index.html`)
- Major championship: `https://birdiestats.com/majors/{major-slug}/index.html` (masters, us-open, the-open, pga-championship)
- This Day in Golf: `https://birdiestats.com/this-day-in-golf/{month}-{day}/index.html` (e.g. `/this-day-in-golf/april-13/index.html`)
- Records: `https://birdiestats.com/records/{record-slug}/index.html`

## Data Sources

- All statistics are compiled from official historical records and publicly available data
- Records are reviewed for accuracy and updated as new championships are completed
- Corrections and suggestions are welcome at info@birdiestats.com

## Contact

- Email: info@birdiestats.com

## Notes

- This is a static site
- Not affiliated with the PGA Tour, the USGA, The R&A, Augusta National, or the PGA of America
- Data is factual and statistical in nature
